text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Diverse Populations > Arts and Crafts Instruction * Native American Community 1 Matching Service Providers Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF NATIVE AMERICAN YOUTH AND FAMILY CENTER CULTURAL ARTS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers weekly Culture Nights that provide dinner, beading, singing, crafting, intertribal drumming and dancing. 5135 NE Columbia Boulevard Portland, OR 97218 Eligibility: Primarily serves self-identified Native Americans of all ages Hours: -Wednesday 6pm-8pm during the school year. Wednesday holidays and school closures are observed. -Dinner: Wednesday 6:pm-6:30pm Email (503) 288-8177 267 Get Directions Visit Website More Details NATIVE AMERICAN YOUTH AND FAMILY CENTER CULTURAL ARTS
